channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Morning News Brief
item.description: President Trump met with Chinese President Xi Jinping for a summit on his first day in the country; Asian reactions to Trump's visit; a court hearing on...

item.title: Former DOJ Official Publicly Criticizes His Former Superiors
item.description: Jonathan Gross, a former Trump appointee at the Justice Department who worked on the 'Weaponization Working Group,' has now voiced strong criticism of his former bosses.

item.title: The MAHA movement is coming to school cafeterias. Here's what that means for kids
item.description: U.S. school districts worry it could get even more expensive to prepare a meal under new federal dietary guidelines, as they also contend with cuts to...

item.title: Voters are caught in the middle as the redistricting battle intensifies
item.description: Much of the focus of the ongoing redistricting war has been on which political party will come out on top. But it's voters who will pay a cost, say vo...
